title: About
text:
Hi, I’m Hari. I like lolcats, data, computers, policy, and several permutations thereof.
My job is somewhere between economist, data scientist, and “person who gets asked to make one more chart.” I work in policy modeling and analysis, which means I spend a lot of time being very precise about things that politicians will later summarise as “the numbers look good.”
Based in Canberra — yes, by choice. Always happy to chat about interesting problems, modeling policy, or buying a farm.


 Back to top

title: Let there be light
text:
Let’s think of a system.
I post every weekend a corpus of my thoughts on matters, some fun modelling I’ve done, or in case it’s one of those weeks, just me ranting about things.
I do hope the honourable reader finds it in themselves the sadistic inclinations society has forced one to push down (probably). An irresponsible person like myself must be named and shamed if that promised weekly post does not come up before start of business Monday morning.
Somewhere down the line, I’m hoping to add functionality to allow anonymous commenting by the honorable reader. Constructive comments, hopefully.
